name: kitchen
hints: The castle kitchen with a floor drain and wooden crate. Both are useful.
GET CRATE - it can be used in the loft. The floor drain leads to a pool of dirty water below.
GET CRATE for use in the loft. GO DRAIN to access the pool of dirty water (room 20) which connects to the fountain. SOUTH returns to the courtyard.
notes: Castle kitchen with a floor drain (leads to pool room 20/fountain) and wooden crate (useful in loft). South returns to courtyard (room 3). The drain-pool-fountain route is an important secret passage.
